## Question

Please ask one clear question.

## Context

Which public page or document is your question about?

## What kind of answer would help?

- [ ] short clarification
- [ ] link to an existing document
- [ ] wording improvement
- [ ] review suggestion

## Boundary note

This repository is public-facing. Please keep questions focused on the public notes, demo plan, and review direction.
